Start a build
Contact

Tell me what needs to work, not just what you want built.

The more clearly you describe the risk, the state that matters, and the outcomes you need, the faster I can tell you whether I am the right engineer for the job.

Email hello@ss-developers.co.za

If you prefer email over forms, that works too.

Availability Focused project slots only

I prefer fewer builds with clearer ownership over stacked commitments.

I read every message myself. If the work is a fit, I will reply with next steps and the information I need to scope it properly.

SS Developers

I build trading, fintech, and data-heavy systems for teams that need the software to stay correct when the environment gets messy.

© 2026 SS Developers. Built in Cape Town.
